programme.title: Power for Living
programme.desc: Powerful words from Evangelist and Pastor Bill Newman.

programme.title: Life with Paul De Jong

programme.title: David Jeremiah
programme.desc: Join pastor Dr David Jeremiah as he challenges viewers to take hold of the truths of God's Word for themselves and to apply it to the daily circumstances in their own life, by presenting God's truth in clear and practical applications.

programme.desc: A vision of Dr Jack Graham to glorify God by introducing Jesus Christ as Lord to as many people as possible and to develop them in Christian living.

programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches messages on the gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help believers understand grace and how blessed they are by their heavenly Father.

programme.title: Katherine Ruonala Ministries
programme.desc: Katherine Ruonala shares a practical message of love and hope to the nations.

programme.title: Jentezen Franklin
programme.desc: Pastor Jentezen Franklin, brings meaning to spiritual truths found in God's Word. Kingdom Connection is the teaching ministry of Free Chapel, a multi-campus church.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: God's love keeps us going through our most challenging times. Today, Joyce shares insights from her personal experience with trusting God to encourage you in difficult times.

programme.title: Mary Magdalene

programme.title: All Saints
programme.desc: When a group of Burmese refugees join the congregation, the pastor of a failing Anglican church attempts to aid them by planting crops and enlisting the help of the community.

programme.title: Longlegs
programme.desc: In pursuit of a serial killer, an FBI agent uncovers a series of occult clues that she must solve to end his terrifying killing spree.

programme.title: Silent Night
programme.desc: A father witnesses his son's death in a gang's crossfire on Christmas Eve. While recovering from a wound that costs him his voice, he makes vengeance his life's mission.

programme.title: Speak No Evil
programme.desc: A dream holiday turns into a living nightmare when an American couple and their daughter spend the weekend at a British family's idyllic country estate.

programme.title: Kraven the Hunter
programme.desc: Kraven's complex relationship with his ruthless father starts him down a path of vengeance, motivating him to become not only the greatest hunter in the world, but also one of its most feared.

programme.title: Something In The Water
programme.desc: A dream wedding turns into a nightmare when five girlfriends fight for their lives in open water.

programme.title: River Wild
programme.desc: A thrill-seeking trip quickly turns into a desperate fight for survival when white-water rafters become stranded in raging rapids, and someone seems intent on sabotage to ensure secrets stay buried.

programme.title: Saturday Night
programme.desc: Tensions run high as producer Lorne Michaels and a ferocious troupe of young comedians and writers prepare for the first broadcast of "Saturday Night Live" on Oct. 11, 1975.

programme.title: Diddy: The Making of a Bad Boy
programme.desc: Exploring Diddy's journey from Sean Combs to Puffy and Diddy, his childhood, music career, and the recent sexual misconduct allegations that challenge perceptions.

programme.title: Dumb Money
programme.desc: The ultimate David versus Goliath story about the insane true story of everyday people who flipped the script on Wall Street and got rich by turning GameStop into the world's hottest company.

programme.title: Spit
programme.desc: An ex-con returns to Australia after 20 years, gets detained, faces old enemies, makes new friends, and teaches his version of mateship while staying one step ahead.

programme.title: Greedy People
programme.desc: Residents of a small island town navigate a murder and the discovery of a million dollars, a series of increasingly bad decisions upend the once peaceful community.

programme.title: Blue Beetle
programme.desc: A Mexican-American college grad's life is turned upside down when a mysterious scarab gives him the ability to generate an exoskeleton suit of incredible power.

programme.title: Freelance
programme.desc: An ex-special forces operative takes on a security gig for a journalist as she interviews a dictator. When a military coup breaks out, they must survive the jungle and assassins.

programme.title: The Killer
programme.desc: An assassin tries to make amends in an effort to restore the sight of a beautiful young singer.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: A battle between two alien robot clans, the Autobots and the Decepticons, is reignited on Earth, with a teenage boy being the only one who holds the power to stop it.

programme.title: Transformers One
programme.desc: The untold origin story of Optimus Prime and Megatron, better known as sworn enemies, but who once were friends bonded like brothers.

programme.title: Bumblebee
programme.desc: Cybertron has fallen. When Optimus Prime sends Bumblebee to protect Earth, he begins his journey to become the hero the universe needs.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: A battle between two alien robot clans, the Autobots and the Decepticons, is reignited on Earth, with a teenage boy being the only one who holds the power to stop it.

programme.title: Transformers: Revenge of the Fallen
programme.desc: When college-bound Sam Witwicky learns the truth about the ancient origins of the Transformers, he must accept his destiny and join Optimus Prime and Bumblebee in their epic battle.

programme.title: Transformers: Dark of the Moon
programme.desc: An event from Earth's past threatens to ignite a war so big that the Transformers alone will not be able to save the planet.

programme.title: Transformers: Age of Extinction
programme.desc: Humans come to realise that their new war against the Autobots could end with their own extinction when a threat more powerful than anything they have ever imagined presents itself.

programme.title: Transformers: The Last Knight
programme.desc: Humans are at war with the Transformers, and Optimus Prime is gone. It's now up to an unlikely alliance.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda 4
programme.desc: After three death-defying adventures, Po, the Dragon Warrior is called upon by destiny to become the spiritual leader of the Valley of Peace.

programme.title: Turbo
programme.desc: A snail that has forever dreamed of the ability to move fast is granted his wish after a freak accident. Now he's out to win the Indy 500.

programme.title: Jumanji
programme.desc: Two kids playing a magic jungle board game release a man trapped in it for 26 years, and a host of dangers that can only be stopped by finishing the game.

programme.title: Jumanji: Welcome to the Jungle
programme.desc: Four high school kids discover an old video game console and are immediately drawn into the game's jungle setting, learning you don't just play Jumanji, you must survive it.

programme.title: Jumanji: The Next Level
programme.desc: As they return to Jumanji to rescue one of their own, nothing is as they expect. They will have to brave parts unknown and unexplored to escape the world's most dangerous game.

programme.title: Detective Pikachu
programme.desc: Ace detective Harry Goodman goes missing, prompting his son Tim to find out what happened. Aiding the investigation is Harry's former Pokemon partner, Detective Pikachu.

programme.title: Early Man
programme.desc: Caveman Dug, his sidekick, Hognob, and their fearless new friend, Goona, must unite their Stone Age tribe against the mighty Bronze Age enemy, Lord Nooth.

programme.title: Pixels
programme.desc: When aliens discover video feeds of classic arcade games and misinterpret them as a declaration of war, they attack the Earth, using the video games as models for their assaults.

programme.title: If
programme.desc: After discovering she can see everyone's imaginary friends, a girl embarks on a magical adventure to reconnect forgotten IFs with their kids.

programme.title: E.T. the Extra-Terrestrial
programme.desc: An extraterrestrial finds a friend in 10-year-old Elliot, while members of a task force work day and night to track down the whereabouts of Earth's first visitor from outer space.

programme.title: Hulk
programme.desc: A freak lab accident reveals Bruce's heroic impulses, but also unleashes his inner demons, and he becomes the most powerful being on the face of the Earth: a superhero and a monster.

programme.title: Matilda
programme.desc: A wonderful little girl who happens to be a genius, along with her understanding teacher, outwit the worst parents and the worst school principal imaginable.

programme.title: Hook
programme.desc: A lawyer who has lost any memory that he was once the legendary Peter Pan must travel to Neverland, aided by Tinker Bell, to rescue his children from his nemesis, Captain Hook.

programme.title: Nanny McPhee
programme.desc: Move over, Mary Poppins. Nanny McPhee is a wonderfully hideous, mysterious nanny hired to tame seven brats with a feckless father.

programme.title: The Nun
programme.desc: When a young nun at a cloistered abbey in Romania takes her own life, a priest with a haunted past and a novitiate about to take her final vows are sent to investigate.

programme.title: Godzilla: King of the Monsters
programme.desc: The crypto-zoological agency Monarch faces off against the mighty Godzilla, who collides with Mothra, Rodan, and his ultimate nemesis: the three-headed King Ghidorah.

programme.title: Van Helsing
programme.desc: Legendary monster hunter Van Helsing must rely on the help of the beautiful and mysterious Anna Valeris as he engages in an epic battle with the ultimate forces of darkness.

programme.title: The Lost World: Jurassic Park
programme.desc: It has been four years since the disaster at Jurassic Park and two groups are in a race against time that will determine the fate of the remote island's prehistoric inhabitants.

programme.title: 2 Guns
programme.desc: When an attempt to take down a drug cartel blows up in their faces, two undercover operatives are forced to go on the run together, though neither knows that the other is a federal agent.

programme.title: The Mummy (2017)
programme.desc: Thought safely entombed beneath the unforgiving desert, an ancient princess, whose destiny was unjustly taken from her, is awakened, bringing terrors that defy human comprehension.

programme.title: Bad Boys 2
programme.desc: Burnett and Lowrey reunite as out-of-control, trash-talking cops. Bullets fly, cars crash, and laughs explode as they pursue a whacked-out drug lord from the streets of Miami to the barrios of Cuba.

programme.title: Nobody
programme.desc: After failing to fight for his family during a robbery, an unassuming father calls on skills from his hidden past to become a lethal vigilante blazing a wild ride to revenge.

programme.title: The Fast and the Furious
programme.desc: An undercover cop infiltrates a street-racing gang led by Dom Toretto, whose fans treat him like a rock star. Dirty money, big-rig hijacking, and high-octane action rev up this thrill ride.

programme.title: Jack Reacher
programme.desc: A military cop becomes involved in a deadly game of cat-and-mouse when five people are randomly murdered by a sniper.

programme.title: The Italian Job
programme.desc: The plan was flawless. The execution was perfect. Charlie Croker pulled off the crime of a lifetime.

programme.title: The Mummy: Tomb of the Dragon Emperor
programme.desc: Rick O'Connell returns to combat a long-entombed emperor who threatens to plunge the world into his merciless service, with the chase going from Shanghai to high into the Himalayas.

programme.title: Wonder Woman 1984
programme.desc: In the vibrant, sleek 1980s, Wonder Woman will have to muster all her strength, wisdom and courage as she finds herself squaring off against Maxwell Lord and the Cheetah.

programme.title: Rough Night
programme.desc: Five best friends from college reunite 10 years later for a wild bachelorette weekend in Miami. Their partying takes a dark turn when they accidentally kill a male stripper.

programme.title: The Hangover
programme.desc: When three friends wake up in a trashed Las Vegas hotel room after a bachelor party, they realise the groom is missing and must piece together the night's events - one hazy clue at a time.

programme.title: Ghostbusters: Afterlife
programme.desc: When a single mother and her two kids arrive in a small town, they begin to discover their connection to the original Ghostbusters and the secret legacy their grandfather left behind.

programme.title: Talladega Nights
programme.desc: Racing sensation Ricky Bobby is a hero because of his "win at all costs" approach. When a French driver challenges him for the supremacy of NASCAR, Ricky must face his own demons.

programme.title: Dumb & Dumber
programme.desc: Lloyd and Harry. One's dumb, the other's dumber. Two dunderheads stumble across a briefcase full of ransom money for kidnappers linked to the Mob.

programme.title: Liar Liar
programme.desc: A fast-talking lawyer and habitual liar discovers that he is unable to tell a lie or withhold the truth about anything for 24 hours after his son makes a birthday wish that comes true.

programme.title: Wanderlust
programme.desc: Rattled by sudden unemployment, a Manhattan couple surveys alternative living options, ultimately deciding to experiment with living on a rural commune where free love rules.

programme.title: Elf
programme.desc: Buddy, a human raised as an elf, is sent to the US in search of his true identity after nearly bringing Santa's operation to a catastrophic standstill due to his size.

programme.title: The War With Grandpa
programme.desc: When grandfather Ed moves in, Peter is forced to give up his bedroom. Unwilling to tolerate this injustice, Peter devises a series of pranks to drive him out.

programme.title: Wedding Crashers
programme.desc: At the biggest nuptials of the year, John breaks the wedding crashing rules and falls for the daughter of the US Secretary of Treasury. Jeremy is left at the mercy of her stage-five-clinger sister.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: When devoted lifeguard Mitch Buchannon butts heads with a new recruit, they must learn to put their differences aside after uncovering a criminal plot that threatens the future of the bay.

programme.title: Scary Movie
programme.desc: In this send-up of the most popular horror movies, a familiar-looking group of teenagers find themselves being stalked by a more-than-vaguely recognisable masked killer.

programme.title: Wanderlust
programme.desc: Rattled by sudden unemployment, a Manhattan couple surveys alternative living options, ultimately deciding to experiment with living on a rural commune where free love rules.

programme.title: Bridesmaids
programme.desc: Annie's life is a mess. But when she finds out her lifelong best friend is engaged, she simply must serve as Lillian's maid of honour.

programme.title: Just Go with It
programme.desc: Danny Maccabee meets the girl of his dreams, but has to enlist his loyal assistant, Katherine, to pretend to be his soon-to-be ex-wife in order to cover up a careless lie.

programme.title: Knocked Up
programme.desc: A one-night stand between a mismatched slacker and a career girl results in a pregnancy that leads to unlikely mutual support.

programme.title: Honey: Rise Up And Dance
programme.desc: An aspiring and determined street dancer comes out of the shadow of her trained dancer sister, and joins a dance competition to win the prize of a college scholarship.

programme.title: Love Actually
programme.desc: Love's causing chaos all over London. Even the PM is smitten. Ten separate stories intertwine in a Christmas Eve climax.

programme.title: Sisters
programme.desc: Given one weekend to clean out their childhood bedroom before their parents sell their family home, two sisters decide to throw one last epic party.

programme.title: Jerry Maguire
programme.desc: A sports agent suddenly discovers his scruples and promptly loses his job. But with the help of one loyal colleague and one outrageous client, he learns that loving well is the best revenge.

programme.title: Mean Girls
programme.desc: A home-schooled newcomer is introduced to the blackboard jungle, where she joins the social outcasts in a planned sabotage of the cool kids.

programme.title: Clueless
programme.desc: So you think you don't have a clue? Join the club, as high-schoolers Cher and Dionne's plan to transform a lonely misfit into a total babe backfires in the worst possible way.

programme.title: Joy Ride
programme.desc: Audrey's business trip to China goes wrong, so she enlists the aid of her best friend Lolo, Chinese soap star Kat, and Lolo's cousin Deadeye.

programme.title: Love Actually
programme.desc: Love's causing chaos all over London. Even the PM is smitten. Ten separate stories intertwine in a Christmas Eve climax.

programme.title: Sisters
programme.desc: Given one weekend to clean out their childhood bedroom before their parents sell their family home, two sisters decide to throw one last epic party.

programme.title: Jerry Maguire
programme.desc: A sports agent suddenly discovers his scruples and promptly loses his job. But with the help of one loyal colleague and one outrageous client, he learns that loving well is the best revenge.

programme.title: Blow
programme.desc: The true story of George Jung, who moved a mountain of cocaine into the USA for Carlos Escobar's Medellin cartel, made $100 million, wound up doing 15 years in jail and blew the lot.

programme.title: Pulp Fiction
programme.desc: In a black comedy about small-time hoods and big-time criminals, the lives of seemingly unrelated people are woven together in a wild and exhilarating adventure that thrills and amuses.

programme.title: The Bourne Identity
programme.desc: Pulled from the sea, Jason Bourne discovers he has the skills of a very dangerous man and no memory of his past.

programme.title: The Bourne Legacy
programme.desc: On the verge of having their conspiracy exposed, members of the government's intelligence community will stop at nothing to erase all evidence of their top secret programs; even the agents involved.

programme.title: Eyes Wide Shut
programme.desc: A doctor enters a secret world of sex play that threatens his life and marriage after his wife admits to fantasies about another man.

programme.title: The Firm
programme.desc: A young gun takes a job in a law firm with connections to the Mafia and is soon caught up in blackmail.

programme.title: Sound of Metal
programme.desc: When ex-addict Ruben unexpectedly loses his hearing his life is thrown into turmoil. In a group home for Deaf addicts, he must choose between his new community and the life of sound he left behind.

programme.title: Billy Elliot
programme.desc: An 11-year-old miner's son is on his way to boxing lessons when he stumbles upon a ballet class. Billy secretly joins the class, knowing that his blue-collar family would never understand.

programme.title: Catch Me If You Can
programme.desc: This is the extraordinary true story of a brilliant young master of deception and the FBI agent hot on his trail.

programme.title: Eyes Wide Shut
programme.desc: A doctor enters a secret world of sex play that threatens his life and marriage after his wife admits to fantasies about another man.

programme.title: The Firm
programme.desc: A young gun takes a job in a law firm with connections to the Mafia and is soon caught up in blackmail.

programme.title: The Frighteners
programme.desc: A scamming clairvoyant finds himself trapped in a supernatural murder mystery.

programme.title: Ghostbusters II
programme.desc: After going out of business, the Ghostbusters reunite to save New York City from a supernatural, slimy doom.

programme.title: National Lampoon's Vacation
programme.desc: The Griswold family's cross-country drive to the Walley World theme park proves to be harder than they ever anticipated.

programme.title: National Lampoon's Christmas Vacation
programme.desc: The Griswold family's plans for a big family Christmas predictably turn into a big disaster.

programme.title: Dante's Peak
programme.desc: Without warning day becomes night, air turns to fire and the ground runs with molten terror. This is a spectacular volcano disaster movie with heart-pounding suspense.

programme.title: Casino
programme.desc: Greed, deception, money and murder envelop two mobsters and a devious trophy wife running a Las Vegas casino.

programme.title: The Karate Kid (1984)
programme.desc: A new kid in town who is picked on by bullies learns karate and eastern philosophy from Mr Miyagi, and learns how to fight back.

programme.title: Out of Africa
programme.desc: Karen Blixen establishes a plantation in wild and untamed Africa, which is now being threatened by an ensuing war between rival native tribes.

programme.title: U.S. Marshals
programme.desc: Marshal Gerard leads the hunt by initiating a hard-target search for a fugitive in an ever-widening perimeter. This film is packed with suspense, action and daring twists.

programme.title: Mercury Rising
programme.desc: An orphaned autistic savant who deciphers a government code in a magazine triggers a national security alarm that makes him an assassin's target.

programme.title: Dante's Peak
programme.desc: Without warning day becomes night, air turns to fire and the ground runs with molten terror. This is a spectacular volcano disaster movie with heart-pounding suspense.

programme.title: Casino
programme.desc: Greed, deception, money and murder envelop two mobsters and a devious trophy wife running a Las Vegas casino.

programme.title: V.C. Andrews' All That Glitters
programme.desc: Driven from the Dumas mansion back to her beloved bayou, Ruby is determined to make a secure and happy home for her precious infant daughter, Pearl.

programme.title: Wrath: A Seven Deadly Sins Story
programme.desc: Single lawyer Chastity Jeffries believes she's found her perfect match in Xavier Collins, but his obsessive love forces her to confront how far she's strayed from her own principles.

programme.title: Don't Scream, It's Me
programme.desc: Fifteen years ago, Liz's ex-boyfriend, Drew, is caught robbing a bank. Now, he's in her backyard, asking her to hide him after a prison escape.

programme.title: The Killer Is Calling
programme.desc: When a mysterious killer targets a remote island town, a veteran 911 operator tries to uncover his motives and save her community, one emergency call at a time.

programme.title: Abducted In The Everglades
programme.desc: A college student vanishes during spring break in Miami. Her mother, with help from a local boatman, braves dangers to urgently search for her and unravel the mystery.

programme.title: Sisters
programme.desc: A reporter who witnesses a brutal murder becomes entangled in a mystery involving conjoined twins who were separated at birth.

programme.title: Trapped in Her Dorm Room
programme.desc: College student Erin becomes trapped in her dorm room during Spring Break when a classmate's harmless adoration turns into a dangerous obsession.

programme.title: Beaches
programme.desc: The serendipitous meeting of two young girls on the Venice Boardwalk, who, although worlds apart in lifestyle, embark on an unexpected and lifelong friendship.

programme.title: Murder At The Lighthouse
programme.desc: Fleeing her abusive ex, Jess hires a boat to Canada, but when it sinks, she's rescued by a reclusive lighthouse keeper. As she heals, Jess realises she's fallen into another trap.

programme.title: Nightmare in the Desert
programme.desc: After returning to her childhood home, someone secretly tracks an outdoor enthusiast and her urbanite boyfriend through the desert.

programme.title: Michael Jackson: Searching for Neverland
programme.desc: Chronicles the intimate moments between Jackson and his children, and documents the professional turbulence that engulfed Jackson, eventually forcing him back to rehearsals for an ill-fated tour.

programme.title: Cyberstalker
programme.desc: An online stalker torments a young woman.

programme.title: The Night Stalker
programme.desc: An attorney who lived in LA during the Night Stalker's murder spree attempts to clear the name of an inmate who she believes was wrongly accused of the crimes.

programme.title: Waking Up To Danger
programme.desc: A young mother picks up the pieces after a horrible accident damages her memory. She soon suspects her husband's indiscretions are what caused her suffering and that her family is in danger.

programme.title: Petals on the Wind
programme.desc: A decade after Cathy, Christopher, and Carrie escaped from their grandparents' attic, the family attempt to put their past behind them, but soon discover certain secrets can't be left behind.

programme.title: Seeds of Yesterday
programme.desc: The saga of the tormented Dollangangers comes to an end where the family continues to coexist miserably.

programme.title: To Have and to Hold
programme.desc: Alice, who still can't believe her high school crush, the dashing, wealthy, and successful Joe, would choose to marry her, willingly allows him to mould her into his ideal socialite wife.

programme.title: Neds
programme.desc: Encompassed by violent street gangs, neglectful parents, bullying teachers and a lack of positive role models, a studious, but emotionally abandoned kid turns thug.

programme.title: Sorry We Missed You
programme.desc: Ricky's family have been fighting against debt since the 2008 financial crash. An opportunity arises to wrestle back some independence, but it's hard work to avoid breaking point.

programme.title: God Help The Girl
programme.desc: Life has never been easy for Eve, but this troubled young girl has a talent and songwriting becomes her way forward. Through her passion for music, she's led to Glasgow's music scene.

programme.title: Stardust (2020)
programme.desc: Meet David before Bowie, one of the greatest icons in music history. But who was the young man behind the many faces?

programme.title: To Olivia
programme.desc: Set between New York, England and Los Angeles, a chronicle of Dahl's struggles while writing some of his most famous works and Neal's return to acting and winning an Oscar.

programme.title: The Railway Man
programme.desc: The captivating, true story of a man who discovers the Japanese officer who tortured him during the war is still alive, and sets out to confront him.

programme.title: The Banksy Job
programme.desc: A documentary exploring the infamous theft of street artist Banksy's sculpture, The Drinker, and the ensuing battle with the art terrorist: AK47.

programme.title: On a Clear Day
programme.desc: A laid-off Glasgow shipbuilder strives to regain his pride after decades on the docks. Without his family's help, he attempts the ultimate test of endurance-swimming the English Channel.

programme.title: Last Days In The Desert
programme.desc: An imagined chapter from Jesus' forty days of fasting and praying in the desert. On his way out of the wilderness, Jesus struggles with the Devil over the fate of a family in crisis.

programme.title: A United Kingdom
programme.desc: The true story of the King of Bechuanaland, and the London office worker he married despite fierce opposition from the British and South African governments.

programme.title: Summerland
programme.desc: During World War II, an Englishwoman opens her heart to an evacuee after initially resolving to be rid of him in this moving journey of womanhood, love and friendship.

programme.title: Fish Tank
programme.desc: A troubled, volatile 15-year-old girl's mum brings a mysterious stranger into their home. It promises to change everything, but life isn't always that simple.

programme.title: Ironclad
programme.desc: Paul Giamatti, James Purefoy, Kate Mara and Brian Cox star in this rollicking Robin Hood-style adventure.

programme.title: Belle
programme.desc: The mixed-race daughter, Dido Elizabeth Belle, of Royal Navy Captain Sir John Lindsay is raised by aristocratic Great-uncle Lord William Murray, 1st Earl of Mansfield in eighteenth century England.

programme.title: Patrick
programme.desc: A young nurse at a public clinic suspects a comatose man may have psychokinetic powers.

programme.title: Snowy
programme.desc: Stuart's trial concludes; Michael organises opposition.

programme.title: Love Serenade
programme.desc: Two sisters in an Australian country town develop a fierce and competitive crush on their new neighbour, a brooding and self-centred radio personality.

programme.title: Wills and Burke
programme.desc: A parody of the two 19th-century explorers who embarked on an ill-fated expedition across the Australian continent.

programme.title: Skippy
programme.desc: Sonny and his kangaroo Skippy live in Waratah National Park in New South Wales. Matt Hammond, Sonny's father is the park ranger. Skippy saves the day in many adventures.

programme.title: Sweat
programme.desc: Tom hits a plateau in his swimming times, frustrated by his lack of progress. He vents to his friend Jake, who offers advice on how to push through the mental block.

programme.title: Cash and Company
programme.desc: Sam and Joe help a local whose livelihood is threatened by Keogh. Setting up shelter for her and her young daughter, they attempt to help rebuild her business.

programme.title: Ten Canoes
programme.desc: In Australia's NT, a man tells us a story of his people. An older man, Minygululu, who has three wives realizes that his younger brother Dayindi may try to steal away the youngest wife.

programme.title: Jedda
programme.desc: Raised by a white ranching family since infancy, an Aboriginal girl gives up her fiance and a life of privilege, when a tribesman seduces her with the lure of the wild.

programme.title: Thirst
programme.desc: The descendant of Elizabeth Bathory is abducted by a cult of blood-drinking, self-proclaimed supermen who want her to join them.

programme.title: Kadaicha
programme.desc: Residents of a housing development face danger after discovering it is built on a sacred Aboriginal graveyard with a curse on anyone who disturbs it.

programme.title: Time-lapse Journey
programme.desc: Tokachi is in Japan's great northern land of Hokkaido, home to vast fields and sprawling pastures. Experience its vibrant summer colors through time-lapse photography.

programme.title: Texico

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: Pediatrician Kumon Kazuko runs a facility in Africa supporting the minds and bodies of children with special needs. This is the story of a Japanese doctor who has been a symbol of hope for 23 years.

programme.title: Dining With The Chef
programme.desc: Learn about Japanese home cooking with Master Chef Saito, based on traditional Japanese cooking techniques in five minutes! Featured recipe: Beef-wrapped Onigiri.

programme.title: Face to Face
programme.desc: Imamura Shogo is a writer of historical fiction who showcases unlikely protagonists to explore modern issues. He talks about his methodology and his efforts to keep paper books alive.

programme.title: BOSAI
programme.desc: What is causing the frequent torrential rain and floods in Japan? Linear rainbands. Find out why this phenomenon is hard to predict and the latest research on forecasting linear rainbands.

programme.title: Pottery the Times Demand
programme.desc: Aichi / Kataoka Mami (curator) Tokoname, a pottery town with over 900 years of history, creates products appropriate for the times. Kataoka finds the beauty that's present in functional objects.

programme.title: Yokai

programme.title: Cinematic Journey
programme.desc: Join our explorers as they pursue the cinematic beauty of Japan. Kyle Card hikes the newly designated long trail around majestic Mt. Fuji and discovers its secrets.

programme.desc: Highlights from this morning. Join Camilla Tominey for a Sunday morning politics show with personality, live from Westminster.

programme.title: Free Speech Nation
programme.desc: Where journalism and comedy meet - round up of the most infuriating stories of the moment, including a comedy take on the week.

programme.title: Fifi and the Flowertots
programme.desc: All the tots are picking fruit so Poppy can use it to make her famous ice cream. Stingo thinks he has come up with a much better plan to get hold of some ice cream. Will it work?

programme.title: Fifi and the Flowertots
programme.desc: Fifi wants to repaint her kitchen but Poppy has run out of paint. Can anybody else come up with an idea to brighten up her walls?

programme.title: Fifi and the Flowertots
programme.desc: The twins are playing hide-and-seek with Pip but they all argue over who is the best at hiding. Can they make up their differences and play nicely together?

programme.title: Postman Pat: Special Delivery Service
programme.sub-title: Postman Pat And The Sculpture Trail
programme.desc: Mrs Goggins has organised a fun sculpture trail, and lots of friends including the children have been busy making their own sculptures to add to the display.

programme.title: Postman Pat: Special Delivery Service
programme.desc: Meera's expecting a gecko to arrive, and has got his lovely tank all ready and cosy to greet her new pet, George.

programme.title: Postman Pat: Special Delivery Service
programme.sub-title: Postman Pat And The Booming Bagpipes
programme.desc: Mrs Goggins is really missing her home town in Scotland. A postcard from her sister hints that a gift's on its way, and she's really looking forward to receiving it.

programme.title: Postman Pat: Special Delivery Service
programme.desc: Poor old Alf, he's planted a big garden full of juicy raspberries and the naughty birds are busy noshing them all. Time for a scarecrow which happily has just arrived at Pencaster Sorting Office.

programme.title: Raa Raa the Noisy Lion
programme.sub-title: Raa Raa And The Rainy Stick
programme.desc: Raa Raa is intrigued when he hears a whooshy rainy noise but its not raining. Following the sound he discovers Ooo Ooo with a rainy stick his favourite thing.

programme.title: Raa Raa the Noisy Lion
programme.sub-title: Raa Raa And The Jungle Phone
programme.desc: When their jungle phone breaks Raa Raa and Ooo Ooo lose contact and Raa Raa thinks Ooo Ooo doesnt want to be friends any more. Luckily Topsy is able to help them find each other again.

programme.title: Fifi and the Flowertots
programme.desc: Aunt Tulip has lost Grubby again. When Stingo finds him, he asks to be made King as a reward.

programme.title: Fifi and the Flowertots
programme.desc: The tots play hide and seek, and the winner will get Fifi's delicious jam tarts. Who will win, Stingo and Slugsy are sure it will be them.

programme.title: Doug Unplugs
programme.desc: When Emma's family vacation gets cancelled, she and Doug figure out how they can have fun while stuck inside her house./ After Dad and Doug get lost on a hike, they have to find their way home.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: Melman learns that his friends stay up late every New Year's Eve to watch the ball drop in Times Square, he's determined to stay up. But as the night goes on, Melman causes total chaos for himself and the gang.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go
programme.desc: When both Sam and Gabriel pre-order the new Commander Kale comic but the supplier only sends one copy, TZG secretly ferries the comic book back and forth between readers.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: Kitty Ranger Team Leader Mama Box helps Kitty Ranger Gabby and Pandy get a lost Baby Me-Owl back home to its Mama in the Fairy Tale Garden. They embark on a hiking adventure.

programme.title: Abominable and the Invisible City
programme.desc: Yi discovers one of Morty's babies still in her building. She attempts to juggle her various responsibilities but it's too much and she accidentally loses Mini-Morty.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Paws of Destiny
programme.desc: The kids meet an unlikely ally when trying to find Po.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back In Business
programme.desc: Convinced old people are the new enemy, Boss Baby uses Tim to create havoc at the senior center, but a war soon begins when the seniors rally against babies.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back In Business
programme.desc: Boss Baby must 'de-stink' Simmons after a misfire of Stinkless Serum, and Tim and Danny try to upgrade their small-scale taxi business.

programme.desc: An imagined chapter from Jesus' forty days of fasting and praying in the desert. On his way out of the wilderness, Jesus struggles with the Devil over the fate of a family in crisis.

programme.title: A United Kingdom
programme.desc: The true story of the King of Bechuanaland, and the London office worker he married despite fierce opposition from the British and South African governments.

programme.title: Summerland
programme.desc: During World War II, an Englishwoman opens her heart to an evacuee after initially resolving to be rid of him in this moving journey of womanhood, love and friendship.

programme.title: Alone in Berlin
programme.desc: In the heart of terror in 1940, two German people resist everyday life and have an extraordinary impact.

programme.title: The Limehouse Golem
programme.desc: When a series of brutal murders occur in London, the community believes that a legendary dark creature must be responsible.

programme.title: Franklyn
programme.desc: Set between the parallel universe of present-day London and a futuristic metropolis, this is a fantasy thriller about four troubled souls whose worlds collide.

programme.title: The Unlikely Pilgrimage of Harold Fry
programme.desc: Harold is an ordinary man who has passed through life, living on the side lines, until he goes to post a letter one day and just keeps walking.

programme.title: In Bruges
programme.desc: After a job goes wrong, two hit men are ordered by their crime boss to cool their heels in Bruges. They don't make good tourists and soon find themselves in the oddest of circumstances.

programme.title: Death Defying Acts
programme.desc: Houdini starts an affair with a psychic out to con the famous escapologist. As the stakes get higher, it soon becomes a question of who is out-conning who.

programme.title: Red Joan
programme.desc: Inspired by the true story of English-born Joan Stanley, who was recruited by the KGB in the mid 1930s and went undetected as a British spy for over a half a century.

programme.title: Hyde Park on Hudson
programme.desc: Global affairs are juggled with the all-too-human side of one of history's iconic leaders Franklin D. Roosevelt as he hosts the English royals for an unforgettable weekend in upstate NY.

programme.title: Le Week-End
programme.desc: A long-married couple revisit Paris for a long weekend for the first time since their honeymoon, in hopes of rekindling their relationship - or, perhaps, to bring it to an end.

programme.title: Kadaicha
programme.desc: Residents of a housing development face danger after discovering it is built on a sacred Aboriginal graveyard with a curse on anyone who disturbs it.

programme.title: Lover Boy
programme.desc: Explores the conflicting worlds of a teenager and a mature woman as they discover the full force of their sexuality.

programme.title: The Highest Honour
programme.desc: The true story of a daring WWII raid on Japanese-occupied Singapore Harbour by Australian and British troops.

programme.title: The History of Australian Surfing
programme.desc: Presents the history of surfing in Australia from its origin in 1915, through its development with wooden boards, the Malibu revolution of the 50s and 60s, and into the radical 80s.

programme.title: Skippy
programme.desc: Sonny and his kangaroo Skippy live in Waratah National Park in New South Wales. Matt Hammond, Sonny's father is the park ranger. Skippy saves the day in many adventures.

programme.title: Ship to Shore
programme.desc: The comic adventures of the kids who live on Circe Island, a fishing community off the coast of Western Australia.

programme.title: Heartbreak High
programme.desc: Jack and Rose are married; sisters Jodie and Karen feud over Matt.

programme.title: The Tracker
programme.desc: (2002) David Gulpilil, Gary Sweet. An Aboriginal tracker assisting a manhunt for a fugitive native leads the white man into a heart of darkness from which there is no return.

programme.title: Blackfellas
programme.desc: An Aboriginal man struggles between loyalty to his people and his desire to break free from a cycle of self-destructive behaviour.

programme.title: Puberty Blues
programme.desc: Two teenage girls fall into a demeaning life of drugs and sex to serve a gang of surfies in this beach-culture classic.

programme.title: Manganinnie
programme.desc: Manganinnie, a Tasmanian Aboriginal woman, searches for her tribe with the company of a lost girl named Joanna.

programme.title: Australian Rules

programme.desc: Design is fun! Design feels good! Cutting-edge images and music guide children to enjoy exploring the ideas and tweaks in the designs all around us. An "Assemble" special episode.

programme.title: Mitateru-phose
programme.desc: This program employs "mitateru," a Japanese technique, to inspire children's imagination by encouraging them to view objects differently and develop their unique perspectives and creativity.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: J-Melo
programme.desc: Join May J. for Japanese music! This week: BRIDEAR (a five-piece all-female heavy metal band with a growing fanbase in Europe) and Matsuura Kodai (a singer with an astonishingly versatile voice).

programme.title: Little Charo
programme.desc: Little Charo is an animation series about a Japanese dog who got lost in NY. "I want to see my owner again!" Charo starts his adventure back home. Season 1-9.

programme.title: Japanology Plus Mini
programme.desc: Frozen food products widely available in Japan include hundreds of pasta dishes and even sushi. New flash-freezing techniques are improving quality, reducing food waste, and driving innovation.

programme.title: A Cat's-Eye View of Japan
programme.desc: Kitties work year-round to keep tiger pufferfish from being snatched up by hungry herons! Myojin Pond is a famous place to see kitties. We dare you not to laugh at the kitty napping inside the shrine!

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: Ekiben Japan
programme.desc: In April, as cherry blossoms bloom in Aomori, the Sakura Bento goes on sale along the Tsugaru Railway, filled with spring flavors like local scallops, tender kombu, and miso with a wild spring plant.

programme.title: Core Kyoto mini
programme.desc: The perfect shading in beautiful tie-dyed patterns may result from sections randomly touching in the dye. Discover the future of clamp resist dyeing.

programme.title: Easy Japanese for Work
programme.desc: Accelerate your Japanese language skills! Learn practical, effective workplace expressions, understand business culture and improve your kanji.

programme.title: Zero Waste Life
programme.desc: Gardener Yamashita Rikito collects plants with nowhere to go, that must be removed for demolition or renovation, and finds them new homes; saving them while saving those who give them up from regret.

programme.title: Somewhere Street
programme.desc: Built on three hills and surrounded by a wall, Siena in central Italy, is a world-famous beautiful city. Its Historic Center dates to the late 13th century and is registered as a World Heritage Site.

programme.title: Time-lapse Journey
programme.desc: For over 100 years, Hirosaki Park in Aomori Prefecture has been a beloved spot to see sakura blossoms. See the multifaceted beauty of sakura blossoms through time-lapse photography.

programme.title: National Parks of Japan
programme.desc: Keramashoto National Park offers pristine waters that support a diverse ecosystem. It's also home to people who proactively carry out conservation activities and proudly carry on a distinct culture.

programme.title: Chatroom Japan
programme.desc: Greg Dvorak and Ono Kenji say Japan is preventing them from fulfilling something essential for their long-term happiness. They want the country to legalize same-sex marriage.

programme.title: Direct Talk
programme.desc: Akasaka Yogetsu, a priest with an international following, is known for combining beatboxing with Buddhist mantras. He talks about Zen philosophy and the spirit of "living in the here and now."

programme.desc: We meet South Korean Kang Dong Ju who runs his own carpentry business in Takayama, Gifu Prefecture, and German Max Geiger, a part-time rickshaw tour guide in Kawagoe, Saitama Prefecture.

programme.title: BOSAI
programme.desc: What is causing the frequent torrential rain and floods in Japan? Linear rainbands. Find out why this phenomenon is hard to predict and the latest research on forecasting linear rainbands.

programme.title: Breakfast with Eamonn and Ellie

programme.desc: Tackling the big stories from all angles and perspectives. Weekdays from midday, Tom Harwood and Emily Carver bring you the most compelling stories from across the United Kingdom.

programme.desc: Join Martin for an up-to-the-minute take on the day's events delivered in his own unique and lively style.

programme.desc: Plain-speaking, straight-talking - Michelle delivers her individual take on the day's news.

programme.title: Farage
programme.desc: Nigel Farage doesn't hold back in his GB News prime-time show. Hear his views and give your own in an action-packed hour of discussion and debate. Join Nigel as he takes on the big stories other media don't want to touch.

programme.title: Fifi and the Flowertots
programme.desc: The twins are sure they have seen fairies in the garden and set out on a hunt to prove it to Fifi. Will they find any?

programme.title: Fifi and the Flowertots
programme.desc: The twins inadvertently ruin Fifi's garden while playing a game. Can they and the other tots make it better before Fifi finds out?

programme.title: Fifi and the Flowertots
programme.desc: Stingo has dispatched Slugsy to steal Fifi's jelly. Slugsy starts to play with the twins and forgets what he set out to do, much to Stingo's wrath.

programme.title: Postman Pat: Special Delivery Service
programme.sub-title: Postman Pat And The Seaside Special
programme.desc: Toot toot! It's the seaside special, stoking it's engines ready for a trip to the seaside. Julian is so excited and is packing buckets, spades, kites and a picnic ready for a fun day out.

programme.title: Postman Pat: Special Delivery Service
programme.sub-title: Postman Pat And The Chinese Dragon
programme.desc: It's Chinese Day at school and the children are really looking forward to a day of special Chinese-themed celebration, helped by Michael.

programme.title: Postman Pat: Special Delivery Service
programme.sub-title: Postman Pat And The Karaoke Night
programme.desc: The children of Greendale have been practising for Karaoke Night and cannot wait to sing. Everyone has a number prepared and they're ready to shake their stuff on the special stage.

programme.title: Postman Pat: Special Delivery Service
programme.desc: Pat's delivering two things: Dottie the hamster, and a didgeridoo from Australia, both to the school. But Dottie goes missing and everyone is searching high and low for her.

programme.title: Raa Raa the Noisy Lion
programme.sub-title: Raa Raa And The Zippy Zipwire
programme.desc: Zebby is too scared to go down the zipwire and everyone chanting loudly at her makes matters worse. Raa Raa realises the noise is putting her off and if everyone is quiet it might help Zebby.

programme.title: Raa Raa the Noisy Lion
programme.sub-title: Raa Raa And The Rainy Stick
programme.desc: Raa Raa is intrigued when he hears a whooshy rainy noise but its not raining. Following the sound he discovers Ooo Ooo with a rainy stick his favourite thing.

programme.title: Dew Drop Diaries
programme.desc: Phoebe's Gratitude Day card flies away before she can give it to Marcus, the Dews try to help her recreate./ Athena finds herself a little short-handed at the Fairhaven Summer Fair.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.sub-title: DJ Catnip Gets His Groove Back
programme.desc: Gabby brings DJ Catnip a microphone for him to use in the big music show, but he has some terrible news: he lost his groove!

programme.title: Doug Unplugs
programme.sub-title: Bot on the Beach/Bot of the Party
programme.desc: After Doug plugs in to learn what a beach is, Emma takes him for a fun day of activities to teach him why people love going to the beach.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: When Gabby unboxes a recipe for dandelion soup and a soup bowl, she discovers Kitty Fairy is sick! Gabby and Pandy make her some delicious dandelion soup and while she rests, they take care of her Garden.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.sub-title: Best Friends Day / The White Whale
programme.desc: Pixie loves to ride the clouds, but she can't understand why Kelp doesn't love it, too./ Kelp helps Ollie fulfill his dream of watching the white whale migration.

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go!
programme.sub-title: Board Silly / Sing for the Fences
programme.desc: Tag and Scooch play board game\Tag thinks it's time for an update to the Pawston City Anthem, which inspires a city-wide music competition where competitors will create new Pawston anthems.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: The gang set off on a wild adventure through New York City to return a teddy bear, and, in the process, Marty learns that some things in life can't be found in an instruction manual.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Paws of Destiny
programme.desc: Po and the kids take a shortcut to the boat bound for the Forbidden City, and are waylaid by a tricky monkey. Zhizhu informs Mayor Li of some distressing sounds coming from the Wellspring.

programme.title: Abominable and the Invisible City
programme.desc: Following the events of the feature, Yi struggles to recreate her violin magic without Everest. While her mum and NaiNai prepare for the grand opening of their family dumpling shop.

programme.title: Billy Graham Classics
programme.desc: How to be born again by repenting of sin, believing in Christ, and obeying him. John 2:23 (Columbus 1995.

programme.title: GGC Life TV
programme.desc: With a vision for a church that is real, life-changing and uplifting, Glorious Gospel Church and their values are based firmly in the bible and their aim is to express the Good News of Jesus Christ in a practical way.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: A Fresh Revelation Of The Communion Brings Healing Pt 4 of 4
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches messages on the gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help believers understand grace and how blessed they are by their heavenly Father.

programme.title: Connect
programme.desc: A school theatre group aspires to stage every book of the Bible. The kids have questions and an ever-expanding cast of surprising and often bizarre visitors is on hand to help them navigate their journey through the scriptures.

programme.title: Jentezen Franklin
programme.desc: Pastor Jentezen Franklin, brings meaning to spiritual truths found in God's Word. Kingdom Connection is the teaching ministry of Free Chapel, a multi-campus church.

programme.title: The Christian View
programme.desc: A fast-paced, high-energy show with a panel of sharp, well-educated, quick-witted women and men - and the occasional guest co-host - discussing today's hot topics and headlines from a Biblical perspective.

programme.title: At the Table
programme.desc: Real women, real conversations, real issues. It's where you'll find information on family, health and spirituality, but most of all, a community doing motherhood together.

programme.title: The Restoration Road
programme.desc: None of us arrive anywhere by accident. We choose, think, pray, and feel our way to our destination. Our inner GPS guides us to one of two places: destruction or restoration.

programme.title: Bible Discovery TV
programme.desc: Hosted by the Hembree family, a daily devotional show where Rod, Janice, Ryan and Corie walk you through the Word in a way that will forever change how you read, learn and experience the Bible.

programme.title: Answers with Bayless Conley
programme.sub-title: What I Got Right and Wrong on My Journey Part 1
programme.desc: In part one of his message What I Got Right and Wrong on My Journey, Pastor Bayless Conley shares candid insights from his personal journey to Christ.

programme.title: Katherine Ruonala Ministries
programme.desc: Katherine Ruonala shares a practical message of love and hope to the nations.

programme.title: The 700 Club
programme.desc: A daily program with news, interviews, lifestyle features and true-life stories from a Christian perspective, including powerful and dramatic testimonies of God touching people's lives.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Joyce Meyer shares scriptures that have been life-changing for her. Discover how God's word can help and empower you to enjoy the life Christ died to give you.

programme.title: In Touch
programme.sub-title: The Fulfilment Of A Promise/The Life of Faith
programme.desc: Tackling issues such as parenting, finances, personal crises, and relationships, Dr Stanley believes the Bible to be the inerrant Word of God, a belief strongly reflected in his teaching.

programme.title: A Safari Romance
programme.desc: A theme park designer is researching a wildlife attraction in South Africa when he meets an American ranger. But Tim's boss has plans that could upend their project & their romantic relationship.

programme.title: Jeni: Hometown Harvest
programme.desc: This time it's Jeni's turn to show off her culinary skills in her new series Hometown Harvest. Jeni and her friends & family are cooking up some of her favourite foods.

programme.title: Bible Man
programme.sub-title: Fibbler's Fakery Goes Up In Fireworks
programme.desc: Miles Peterson had everything: Money, power, fame until he lost it. Then Miles finds the power of God and harnesses that power to become Bibleman.

programme.title: Sea Kids
programme.desc: The Sea Kids will help transform the heart and mind of every child as they learn how to tangibly live out biblical principles and build a strong foundation in Jesus.

programme.title: Holy Moly
programme.desc: This program turns the Bible into a living, breathing colouring book that will delight children of all ages. The series focuses on the Biblical characters' actions and emotions.

programme.title: The Blello Show
programme.desc: Join Kyle, Lyds, Extra Bear, and Stu as they share with you some cool vids, catchy catch phrases crazy challenges, things you can do in three minutes, and other random stuff to make your life awesome.

programme.title: Elevation Experience
programme.desc: The Elevation Experience with Pastor Steven Furtick features inspirational messages from Pastor Steven as well as original worship music from Elevation Church in Charlotte, North Carolina.

programme.title: A Moment in History
programme.desc: Join host Seth Udinski as he explores the most pivotal moments in history and the Bible, providing insight into the events that have shaped our world.

programme.title: Soul Sessions
programme.desc: An exploration into the New Zealand gospel music scene with a focus on Pacific musicians and artists.

programme.title: Drive Thru History: Ends of the Earth

programme.title: This Changed Everything
programme.desc: Celebrates the fruits of the Reformation while exploring difficult questions about the cost of division: Could schism have been avoided? What did Jesus really mean when He prayed for His followers to be 'one'?

programme.title: Celtic Rhythms
programme.desc: Take a journey through Ireland, Scotland, England, & Wales for an adventure in prayer & faith. Travel deep into the heart of Celtic lands; be inspired by the early Celtic Christians to build a rhythm of prayer.

programme.title: Jesus the Game Changer
programme.desc: Despite the popular stereotype that Christianity is anti-intellectual and anti-scientific, modern education, academia and science are actually rooted in large measure in the teachings of Jesus.

programme.title: The Incredible Journey
programme.desc: Gary Kent is passionate about sharing the good news of Christ and preparing people for the soon coming of Jesus, offering Biblical answers to life's questions.

programme.title: New Creation Church

programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches messages on the gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help believers understand grace and how blessed they are by their heavenly Father.

programme.title: Joel Osteen

programme.title: The Way of the Master
programme.desc: A look at the alien and UFO phenomenon from a Christian perspective.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Joyce Meyer shares scriptures that have been life-changing for her. Discover how God's word can help and empower you to enjoy the life Christ died to give you.

programme.title: Hillary: Ocean to Sky
programme.desc: Follows Sir Edmund Hillary and his companions on the monumental journey that most New Zealanders don't know about, where Ed nearly lost his life.

programme.title: Power for Living
programme.desc: Powerful words from Evangelist and Pastor Bill Newman.

programme.title: In Touch
programme.sub-title: The Fulfilment Of A Promise/The Life of Faith
programme.desc: Tackling issues such as parenting, finances, personal crises, and relationships, Dr Stanley believes the Bible to be the inerrant Word of God, a belief strongly reflected in his teaching.

programme.title: Anyone But You
programme.desc: Bea and Ben's initial attraction quickly turns sour until they must pretend to be a couple.

programme.title: Sumotherhood
programme.desc: Two wannabe gangsters hold up a local bank, but when things don't go according to plan, a misunderstanding leads them into business with one of East London's most notorious gangs.

programme.title: Klitschko: More Than a Fight
programme.desc: Former heavyweight boxing world champion and current Mayor of Kyiv, Vitali Klitschko, is an extraordinary individual with an urgent engagement with one of the most pressing issues of our time.

programme.title: Strange Way of Life
programme.desc: After 25 years, Silva rides a horse across the desert to visit his friend Sheriff Jake. They celebrate the meeting, but the next morning Jake tells him the reason for his trip.

programme.title: YOLO
programme.desc: After an argument with her younger sister, Le Ying moves out on her own. She meets a boxing trainer and starts boxing.

programme.title: Immaculate
programme.desc: A woman of devout faith is offered a new role at an illustrious convent. But, it soon becomes clear that her new home harbours dark and horrifying secrets.

programme.title: Depravity

programme.title: In Touch

programme.title: David Pawson
programme.desc: Why was the Bible written? UK theologian, Cambridge scholar, pastor and Bible teacher, David Pawson explores scripture and discovers some hidden gems.

programme.title: An Easter Bloom
programme.desc: A young gardener sets out to save her family farm by entering a floral competition for Easter. She meets a local pastor along the way who helps her restore the hope she lost.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: Unveiling Jesus' Heart To Serve You Pt 1 of 4
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help believers understand grace and how deeply loved they are by their heavenly Father.

programme.title: Friends and Heroes
programme.desc: Friends and Heroes is an animated children's adventure based in Ancient Egypt, Israel and Rome. The story follows two young friends Macky and Portia as they fight for justice against the Roman Empire.

programme.title: Night Owls & Early Birds
programme.desc: Join Hoot, Savannah, Screech, Charlie, and Steve as they take a deeper dive into the truths found in God's Word.

programme.title: The Garden
programme.sub-title: The Truth is the Mane Thing
programme.desc: Lenny Lion and Lucy Lamb are the caretakers for a magical garden where anything can grow. They work for The Boss (God) who gives them a new assignment to complete in every episode.

programme.title: Impact for Life
programme.desc: Pastors Peter and Bev Mortlock share principles for living, hear life stories from everyday New Zealanders and equip people to mature and grow into Christ-likeness while maximising their potential.

programme.title: Be Great. Do Good
programme.desc: Launching, building and running a business can be an exciting undertaking. But even as many look on and see the success, sometimes behind that success is betrayal, lost friendships and relationships.

programme.title: Three Chairs
programme.desc: A talk show with a difference that celebrates the art of good conversation. Hosts grapple with topics including dating, phone addiction, parenting, and gender equality.

programme.title: View & Chew
programme.desc: Mike dishes out the deets on Chicago's most famous deep dish and keeps the ribs coming at a speakeasy-turned-BBQ joint.

programme.title: Centuries Collide
programme.sub-title: St. Valentine - The OG of Love
programme.desc: There are so many legends surrounding St. Valentine that he almost borders on the mythological. We go to Rome to discover why we celebrate his day every year and why his legend has survived nearly 2000 years!

programme.title: Jentezen Franklin
programme.desc: Pastor Jentezen Franklin, brings meaning to spiritual truths found in God's Word. Kingdom Connection is the teaching ministry of Free Chapel, a multi-campus church.

programme.title: David Jeremiah
programme.desc: Join pastor Dr David Jeremiah as he challenges viewers to take hold of the truths of God's Word for themselves and to apply it to the daily circumstances in their own life, by presenting God's truth in clear and practical applications.

programme.title: PowerPoint with Jack Graham
programme.desc: A vision of Dr Jack Graham to glorify God by introducing Jesus Christ as Lord to as many people as possible and to develop them in Christian living.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Joyce Meyer shares scriptures that have been life-changing for her. Discover how God's word can help and empower you to enjoy the life Christ died to give you.

programme.title: Hour of Power
programme.desc: Bobby Schuller provides principles and practices that can help people become happy students of Jesus and live a life of meaning believing there is no fuller, richer life than the one that is lived in Christ.

programme.title: Drive Thru History: The Gospels

programme.desc: Read about places like Beersheba, Jericho, Jerusalem, Caesarea, and cities surrounding the Sea of Galilee, and discover that those places exist just as the Bible describes.

programme.title: What's Cooking with Young & Free

programme.title: OK TV

programme.title: Connect

programme.title: TV One Life

programme.title: Katherine Ruonala Ministries
programme.desc: Katherine Ruonala shares a practical message of love and hope to the nations.

programme.title: A Very Tall Man
programme.desc: Gary Hoogvliet, a very tall man, interviews interesting folk, not quite as tall as he, but nevertheless with fascinating and inspiring stories to tell.

programme.title: Be That

programme.title: When Calls the Heart

programme.title: HumanKind
programme.desc: Can one hour a week really change a child's future? In Melbourne, Marion Macaulay proves it can. Through Kids Hope, she's showing how consistent mentorship can be a beacon of hope for young lives.

programme.title: The Kindness Diaries
programme.desc: Leon Logothetis hops on a vintage motorbike for a 25,000-mile trip around the world with no money, food, petrol or place to stay. He puts his fate in the hands of strangers and rewards those who show kindness.

programme.title: Kill
programme.desc: During a train trip to New Delhi, a pair of commandos face an army of invading bandits.
